data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Facilitates quick decision making by limiting options and providing intuitive categories.
data.technical_spec: Shows personalized content recommendations on the home screen.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Ensures ease of navigation with easily clickable controls.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates large thumbnails and responsive design for easy selection.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligns with user expectations through familiar web conventions.
data.technical_spec: Maintains consistency in user interface and streaming controls.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related content closely to improve comprehension and ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Clusters similar genres and recommends based on viewer behavior.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Balances visual appeal with functionality to build user trust.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes clean design, animations, and seamless transitions.
